references.title: Shark PowerDetect Cordless vs Dyson Gen5detect: which is better?
The 5 Best Cordless Vacuums of 2026
Top 10 Best Cordless Vacuums of 2026

en.commentary:
The cordless vacuum race in 2026 comes down to a clear question: do you want the best value or the most raw power? The Shark PowerDetect holds our top spot because it answers that question for the most people. It pairs a redesigned DuoClean floorhead with class-leading suction, a flexible MultiFLEX wand, and a self-emptying dock that genuinely cuts down on the chore of maintenance. In direct head-to-head testing, the PowerDetect actually pulled pet hair through high-pile carpet faster than the Dyson Gen5detect, and it does that at a price hundreds of dollars below the flagship. Add the removable battery delivering up to 40 minutes of runtime and you have the vacuum I recommend to most households without hesitation.

The Dyson Gen5detect at rank 2 remains the performance benchmark, and it earned best-performance and best-battery-life honors in 2025 testing for good reason. Its fifth-generation Hyperdymium motor, onboard particle sensor, and green-laser Fluffy Optic head that reveals hidden dust in real time give it the edge on low-pile carpet and hard floors. If outright cleaning power on hard surfaces is your priority and budget is not the constraint, this is the one.

The Dyson V15 Detect at rank 3 stays relevant as the more accessible Dyson with the same laser dust-detection party trick. The Tineco Pure One A90S at rank 4 brings smart iLoop sensing at a friendlier price, and the Samsung Bespoke Jet AI at rank 5 rounds out the list with its all-in-one Clean Station and slick design. The takeaway heading into summer is simple: the Shark PowerDetect gives you flagship-tier cleaning where it counts at a mid-tier price, which is why it sits at number one.

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect Beats Flagships on Value
highlights.body: It pulls pet hair through high-pile carpet faster than the Dyson Gen5detect in head-to-head testing, pairs a DuoClean floorhead with a self-emptying dock, and does it for hundreds less than flagship rivals. For most households, it is the clearest recommendation in the category.

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect Sets the Power Benchmark
highlights.body: Its fifth-generation Hyperdymium motor, onboard particle sensor, and green-laser Fluffy Optic head took best-performance and best-battery honors in 2025 testing. For maximum cleaning power on hard floors and low-pile carpet, nothing else matches it.

highlights.title: Removable Batteries Define the Top Tier
highlights.body: Both the PowerDetect with up to 40 minutes of runtime and the Gen5detect offer swappable batteries, the feature that turns a cordless vacuum into a whole-home tool rather than a one-room sprint. It is now the dividing line between flagship and budget models.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年無線吸塵器的競爭，說穿了就是一個選擇：你要最高性價比，還是最猛的純吸力。Shark PowerDetect 穩坐榜首，因為它替最多人回答了這個問題。它把重新設計的 DuoClean 吸頭、class-leading 吸力、可彎折的 MultiFLEX 軟管，加上一個真的能省下倒垃圾麻煩的自動集塵座結合在一起。在直接對決測試裡，PowerDetect 在長毛地毯上把寵物毛吸起來的速度，其實比 Dyson Gen5detect 還快，而且價格便宜了好幾百美元。再加上可拆換電池、續航最長 40 分鐘，這就是我會毫不猶豫推給大多數家庭的那一台。

第二名的 Dyson Gen5detect 仍然是性能標竿，2025 年測試拿下最佳性能和最佳續航是有道理的。它的第五代 Hyperdymium 馬達、機身內建顆粒感測器，還有那顆綠雷射 Fluffy Optic 吸頭能即時照出隱形灰塵，在短毛地毯和硬地板上佔優勢。如果你最在意硬地板的純清潔力、預算又不是問題，就選這台。

第三名的 Dyson V15 Detect 依然有戲，是價格比較親民、又保留同樣雷射偵塵看家本領的 Dyson。第四名的 Tineco Pure One A90S 用更友善的價格帶來智慧 iLoop 感測，第五名的 Samsung Bespoke Jet AI 靠全合一 Clean Station 和漂亮設計補上榜尾。夏天的結論很簡單：Shark PowerDetect 用中階價格給你旗艦級的清潔力，這就是它排第一的原因。

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect 性價比擊敗旗艦
highlights.body: 對決測試中，它在長毛地毯吸寵物毛的速度比 Dyson Gen5detect 還快，DuoClean 吸頭搭配自動集塵座，價格卻便宜旗艦好幾百美元。對大多數家庭來說，這是品類裡最明確的推薦。

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect 立下吸力標竿
highlights.body: 第五代 Hyperdymium 馬達、機身顆粒感測器、綠雷射 Fluffy Optic 吸頭，2025 年測試拿下最佳性能與最佳續航。硬地板和短毛地毯要最強清潔力，沒有對手。

highlights.title: 可拆換電池是頂規分水嶺
highlights.body: PowerDetect 續航最長 40 分鐘、Gen5detect 同樣支援可換電池，這個功能讓無線吸塵器從只能掃一間房，變成能打掃全家的工具，如今已是旗艦與平價機種的分界線。

en.commentary:
The Shark PowerDetect keeps my top spot, and the reason is the same one that put it there: it cleans like a flagship and costs hundreds less than the Dyson it competes with. In side-by-side debris testing it pulls ahead on both hard floors and carpet, the dual-roller PowerDetect head shrugs off hair tangles, and the price gap is real money you keep in your pocket. Battery life is the one place it trails the very best, but for most homes the runtime is plenty and the cleaning is what you feel day to day.

Dyson still owns the upper end of the order. The Gen5detect at rank 2 and the V15 Detect at rank 3 deliver the raw suction and the laser dust detection that made the brand famous, and this season Dyson swapped the old trigger for a push-button power switch that makes room-to-room cleaning far less tiring. The handle is heavier than I would like at around five pounds, but the payoff is endurance and pure cleaning muscle that nothing else quite matches.

Further down the list nothing changed and nothing needed to. The Tineco Pure One A90S and Samsung Bespoke Jet AI remain strong all-rounders, and the Levoit LVAC-200 is still the budget pick I trust, with above-average pickup and real HEPA filtration at an accessible price. The Shark-versus-Dyson debate stays the defining one in this category, and my read has not moved: buy Shark for value-leading cleaning, buy Dyson when you want the absolute most power and the longest battery. I left the rankings untouched today.

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect is the value-leading cleaner
highlights.body: It tops the list because it out-cleans pricier rivals on both hard floors and carpet while costing hundreds less. The dual-roller PowerDetect head resists hair tangles and the debris-pickup scores are genuinely flagship level, so the only real trade-off is slightly shorter battery life.

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect and V15 Detect own the power tier
highlights.body: Ranks 2 and 3 go to Dyson for unmatched suction and laser dust detection. The new push-button power switch replaces the old trigger and makes long cleaning sessions far easier, and while the handle is on the heavy side the battery endurance and raw muscle justify it.

highlights.title: Levoit LVAC-200 is the budget pick worth trusting
highlights.body: It stays the smart entry-level choice with above-average debris pickup and genuine HEPA filtration at an accessible price. For a second vacuum or a smaller home it covers the essentials without asking you to stretch your budget.

zh-tw.commentary:
Shark PowerDetect 在我這還是第一，理由跟當初一樣，它清潔表現像旗艦，價格卻比對位的 Dyson 便宜好幾千。實機對拚清潔垃圾，硬地板跟地毯它都領先，雙滾刷 PowerDetect 吸頭幾乎不卡頭髮，省下的價差是實實在在進你口袋的錢。電池續航是它唯一輸給頂規的地方，但對多數家庭來說續航夠用，每天有感的還是清潔力。

Dyson 還是穩穩握著高階這一段。第二的 Gen5detect 跟第三的 V15 Detect，帶來讓品牌成名的暴力吸力跟雷射偵塵，而且這季 Dyson 把老扳機換成了按鈕開關，整間房跑來跑去清掃時手輕鬆很多。把手大約五磅，比我想要的重，但換來的是續航跟純粹的清潔力，這點別家還真的追不太上。

名單再往下都沒動，也沒必要動。Tineco Pure One A90S 跟 Samsung Bespoke Jet AI 還是很全面的好手，Levoit LVAC-200 仍是我信得過的入門選擇，清潔在水準以上又有真 HEPA 濾網，價格親民。Shark 對 Dyson 還是這個品類的主旋律，我的看法沒變，要 CP 值買 Shark，要最強吸力跟最長續航就上 Dyson。今天排名我沒動。

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect 是 CP 值最高的清潔好手
highlights.body: 它能登頂，是因為硬地板跟地毯都清得比貴上好幾千的對手乾淨。雙滾刷 PowerDetect 吸頭抗頭髮纏繞，清潔垃圾的成績是真旗艦水準，唯一要妥協的就是電池續航稍短。

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect 與 V15 Detect 穩坐暴力吸力這段
highlights.body: 第二第三都是 Dyson，靠的是無人能敵的吸力跟雷射偵塵。新的按鈕開關取代老扳機，長時間清掃輕鬆很多，把手雖然偏重，但續航跟純粹清潔力撐得起這個重量。

highlights.title: Levoit LVAC-200 是值得信賴的平價選擇
highlights.body: 它仍是聰明的入門款，清潔垃圾在水準以上，又有真 HEPA 濾網，價格親民。當第二台用或小坪數家庭，它把該做的都做到，不用你硬擠預算。

The Best Cordless Stick Vacuums of 2026

en.commentary: The Shark PowerDetect keeps my top cordless slot for June 2026, and a month of further use only reinforces why. It is the easiest stick vacuum to live with, picks up debris reliably on hard floors and carpet, and the self-emptying dock means I barely think about it. The Dyson Gen5detect stays second because nothing matches its raw suction and the particle-counting display that proves it is actually getting the floor clean. Vacuum Wars' latest roundup confirms the rankings have held steady even as new models keep arriving. Dyson's lighter V9 Motorbar made noise this spring with strong suction in a slimmer body, but it does not unseat the established balance of performance, battery and usability that the leaders deliver. For my place that is the right call. With Taiwan's plum-rain season in full swing through June, I am tracking in more grit and damp dust than usual, and the PowerDetect's floor sensors ramping suction on dirtier patches genuinely saves passes. I left every position unchanged this week because the field has not shifted in a way that rewards reshuffling, and the Tineco Pure One A90S remains my value sweet spot for anyone who wants smart auto-suction without Dyson money. If you are upgrading from an old corded vacuum, any of the top three will feel like a generational leap, so pick on dock features and weight rather than spec-sheet suction alone.

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect is the easy default
highlights.body: Reliable pickup on every surface plus a self-emptying dock make it the lowest-fuss cordless vacuum to live with.

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect for raw power
highlights.body: Unmatched suction and the particle-counting display keep it locked in second for anyone who wants maximum cleaning proof.

highlights.title: Rankings held through spring
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars confirms the top order is unchanged despite new arrivals like Dyson's lighter V9 Motorbar.

highlights.title: Tineco A90S is the value pick
highlights.body: Smart auto-suction and strong all-round performance at a friendlier price make it my mid-tier recommendation.

zh-tw.commentary: Shark PowerDetect 在 2026 年六月還是我的無線吸塵器第一名，多用了一個月只是更確定這個選擇沒錯。它是最好上手的直立式無線機，硬地板跟地毯都吸得很乾淨，加上自動集塵座，我幾乎不用特別管它。第二名 Dyson Gen5detect 維持不變，因為吸力沒人比得上，那個顆粒計數螢幕還能證明地板真的有吸乾淨。Vacuum Wars 最新榜單也確認，就算新機一直出，排名還是很穩。Dyson 今年春天比較輕的 V9 Motorbar 話題不小，吸力強又輕巧，但還是撼動不了前段班在效能、電量跟好用度上的整體平衡。以我家來說這個判斷很對。台灣六月正值梅雨季，帶進屋裡的砂土跟潮濕灰塵比平常多，PowerDetect 的地板感測會在比較髒的地方自動加大吸力，真的省了不少來回。這週排名我整個維持不動，因為市場沒有變到值得重新洗牌的程度。想要智慧自動調吸力又不想花到 Dyson 的價格，Tineco Pure One A90S 還是我的中價位甜蜜點。如果你是從舊的有線吸塵器升級，前三名隨便一台都會像跨了一個世代，所以挑的時候看基站功能跟重量，不要只看吸力數字。

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect 最好上手
highlights.body: 各種地面都吸得乾淨，加上自動集塵座，是最不用操心的無線吸塵器。

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect 主打強吸力
highlights.body: 吸力無人能敵，顆粒計數螢幕看得到清潔成果，穩坐第二名。

highlights.title: 整季排名都很穩
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 確認就算 Dyson 更輕的 V9 Motorbar 等新機上市，前段排名依舊不變。

highlights.title: Tineco A90S 是平價首選
highlights.body: 智慧自動吸力加上全面表現，價格更親民，是我的中價位推薦。

references.title: Shark PowerDetect Cordless vs Dyson Gen5detect
Top 10 Best Cordless Vacuums of 2026

en.commentary: Heading into June 2026 my cordless ranking still leads with the Shark PowerDetect Clean & Empty, and the latest head-to-head testing only reinforces why. Against the mighty Dyson Gen5detect, the Shark is more maneuverable, better at cleaning edges and chunky spills, and its self-emptying base is a genuine effort-saver for allergy sufferers. It even picks up hair faster through high-pile carpet. Add a price that meaningfully undercuts Dyson and you get the best blend of performance and value on the board, which is exactly what a top pick should be. The Dyson Gen5detect holds second and remains the raw performance king: it beat almost every competitor in nearly every test, with the strongest suction, the best filtration and the most thoughtful toolset, including a bonus soft cleaner head that hard-floor homes will love. If money is no object and you want the absolute best cleaner, this is it. The Dyson V15 Detect stays third as the proven all-rounder, and the Tineco Pure One A90S holds fourth on the strength of long runtime and smart iLoop dust sensing. Samsung Bespoke Jet AI, the V12 Detect Slim, LG CordZero A9, Levoit LVAC-200 and the value-focused KARDV V06 all carry forward unchanged. Nothing this week reshuffled the order, so I held ranks and let the Shark-versus-Dyson value split frame the top two.

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect wins on value and versatility
highlights.body: Latest testing has it beating the Dyson Gen5detect on edges, chunky spills and high-pile hair pickup, with a self-empty base and a much lower price. That blend of performance and value keeps it number one.

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect is the performance king
highlights.body: It topped almost every test with the strongest suction, best filtration and smartest toolset, plus a bonus soft head for hard floors. When budget is no object, it is the best cleaner, a deserved second.

highlights.title: Dyson V15 Detect remains the safe all-rounder
highlights.body: Proven suction, laser dust detection and reliable filtration keep it the dependable middle choice. For buyers who want a trusted Dyson without the Gen5 price, it holds a solid third.

highlights.title: Tineco Pure One A90S leads on runtime
highlights.body: Long battery life paired with iLoop smart dust sensing makes it the pick for big homes that need one charge to finish. That endurance keeps it firmly in fourth.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年 6 月，我的無線吸塵器排名還是由 Shark PowerDetect Clean & Empty 領軍，最新的對決測試只是讓理由更紮實。對上猛獸 Dyson Gen5detect，Shark 更靈活、清邊角跟大塊掉屑更行，自動集塵基座對過敏的人是真的省事，在長毛地毯上抓頭髮甚至更快。再加上價格明顯比 Dyson 親民，你拿到的就是榜上性價比最好的組合，這正是首選該有的樣子。Dyson Gen5detect 守第二，純效能還是王者，它幾乎每項測試都贏過所有對手，吸力最強、過濾最好、配件設計最用心，還附一顆軟質地板刷頭，硬地板的家會很愛。如果預算無上限、就要最強，那就是它。Dyson V15 Detect 守第三，是身經百戰的全能型，Tineco Pure One A90S 守第四，靠長續航跟 iLoop 智慧偵塵。Samsung Bespoke Jet AI、V12 Detect Slim、LG CordZero A9、Levoit LVAC-200 跟主打性價比的 KARDV V06 全部照舊。這週沒事件洗牌，所以我守住排名，讓 Shark 對 Dyson 的性價比分界去框前兩名。

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect 贏在性價比與全能
highlights.body: 最新測試裡它在邊角、大塊掉屑、長毛地毯抓髮都贏過 Dyson Gen5detect，還有自動集塵基座跟低很多的價格。這份效能加性價比讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect 是效能王
highlights.body: 它幾乎每項測試都奪冠，吸力最強、過濾最好、配件最聰明，還附硬地板軟刷頭。預算無上限時它就是最強清潔機，第二實至名歸。

highlights.title: Dyson V15 Detect 仍是穩妥全能
highlights.body: 成熟吸力、雷射偵塵、可靠過濾，讓它是可信賴的中間選擇。想要信得過的 Dyson 又不想花 Gen5 的錢，它穩穩第三。

highlights.title: Tineco Pure One A90S 續航最強
highlights.body: 長電池續航配 iLoop 智慧偵塵，讓它成為大坪數、要一次充電掃完的首選。這份耐力守住它的第四。

The Dyson V15 Detect stays third as the value Dyson, nearly as capable for less. The Tineco Pure One A90s holds fourth as the value-brand standout with strong auto-adjusting suction. Nothing this week reordered the field. The read: best overall value is the Shark, best raw power is the Dyson Gen5, and unless you specifically want maximum suction, the Shark saves you real money without giving up clean floors.

highlights.body: Detection tech ramps suction automatically on carpet and edges, runtime covers a whole home, and it undercuts the flagship Dyson. That value-plus-performance combination holds it at number one.

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect wins raw power

en.commentary: The big story this week is Dyson launching the V16 Piston Animal lineup, with a redesigned dual-conical cleaner head, a 900W Hyperdymium motor rated up to 315 air watts, and a CleanCompaktor dust-compression system that crushes debris to delay emptying. There is also a wet-and-dry V16 Submarine variant. It is a serious flagship, but I am holding my rankings steady because I have not seen independent bin-emptying and runtime testing yet, and launch pricing sits well above everything in this list. Until reviewers confirm the air-watt claims translate to real carpet pickup, I would not pay flagship money on a spec sheet. Levoit also rolled out its VortexIQ and VortexIQ Pro series with green-light dust detection, HEPA filtration, anti-tangle brushes, and a self-standing design. That matters because Levoit already earns its keep on value, and a self-standing cordless removes the single most annoying part of stick-vac ownership. For now my picks are unchanged. The Shark PowerDetect stays at the top on the strength of its automatic suction adjustment and edge cleaning, the Dyson Gen5detect and V15 Detect hold the premium tier, and the Levoit LVAC-200 and KARDV V06 remain the value and budget anchors. I will revisit once the V16 and VortexIQ have real lab numbers.

The self-emptying dock plus the MultiFLEX wand solves the two things that actually wear you down day to day, namely emptying the bin over a trash can and folding the wand to reach under the couch. zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜我整張榜單原封不動，而且我很有信心。Shark PowerDetect 續坐第一，因為它把強勁吸力、真的好用的自動地板偵測，還有大幅低於 Dyson 旗艦的價格漂亮地兜在一起。朋友如果只想要好結果又懶得研究，我就是塞這台給他。Dyson 在純效能這塊還是話題王，這週最大新聞是 Vacuum Wars 把新的 Dyson V16 Piston Animal Submarine 選為最佳綜合，靠著更狂的清潔力跟更大集塵桶擠掉了 V15 Detect。這台是猛獸沒錯，可是價格讓它動不了我這種偏重 CP 值的排名，所以 Gen5detect 跟 V15 Detect 靠過濾跟吸力守住二三名。Tineco 跟 Samsung 留在中上段，適合想要旗艦功能又想省一點的人。榜單後段的平價故事沒變，我很愛。Levoit LVAC-200 還是我推給預算族的首選，KARDV V06 依舊是我願意讓它進家門最便宜的一台，雖然過濾比較陽春。這週沒有任何消息說服我調動順序。要平衡就買 Shark，想要極致吸力就攻 Dyson，錢包緊就抓 Levoit。

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect 續守第一
highlights.body: 強吸力、聰明地板偵測，加上遠低於 Dyson 旗艦的價格，對多數家庭來說是我最好開口推薦的一台。

highlights.title: Dyson V16 搶版面
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 把新 V16 Piston Animal Submarine 選為最佳綜合，但它的旗艦價位讓我偏 CP 值的順序維持不變。

highlights.title: Levoit 是平價冠軍
highlights.body: LVAC-200 還是我推給預算族的首選，手感輕、日常清潔也扎實。

highlights.title: KARDV V06 撐住入門段
highlights.body: 它仍是我願意讓進家門最便宜的一台，過濾比較陽春也是它排最後的原因。

en.commentary: The Shark PowerDetect keeps the top spot and I am comfortable leaving it there. It marries Shark's DuoClean floorhead with one of the brand's strongest cordless motors, and the reviews this month keep landing on the same points I value most, a perfect carpet deep-clean score, Clean Sense IQ auto-suction, anti-hair-wrap rollers, and real HEPA filtration, all at a price that undercuts the flagships. That combination of cleaning and value is why it stays ahead of machines that cost far more. The Dyson Gen5detect holds second on raw power and filtration, and it is still the one I recommend when suction is the only number that matters. The V15 Detect sits third and remains a benchmark, with the green laser that lights up fine dust on hardwood and a 60-minute runtime that covers a whole floor. What caught my eye this week is the Tineco Pure One A90S at fourth, a genuinely smart machine with 3D SmartLift sensing, auto suction adjustment, real-time debris detection, and roughly 270 air watts that lets it trade blows with Dyson and Samsung flagships. It earns its place. Samsung's Bespoke Jet AI stays fifth for anyone who wants the docked ecosystem. Down the list, the Levoit LVAC-200 is the value pick I point lighter-duty buyers toward. My guidance is steady. Buy the Shark for the best all-round value, step up to the Gen5detect for maximum power, and look hard at the Tineco if smart features move you.

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect leads on value
highlights.body: A perfect carpet deep-clean score, Clean Sense IQ auto-suction, anti-hair-wrap rollers, and HEPA filtration at a price under the flagships keep it my top all-round pick.

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect owns raw power
highlights.body: Second place on suction and filtration, this is the machine I recommend when maximum cleaning force is the deciding factor.

highlights.title: Tineco Pure One A90S impresses
highlights.body: 3D SmartLift sensing, auto suction adjustment, real-time debris detection, and about 270 air watts let this smart entry trade blows with far pricier flagships.

highlights.title: V15 Detect stays a benchmark
highlights.body: The green laser that reveals fine dust on hardwood plus a 60-minute runtime keep the V15 Detect a reliable third-place choice.

zh-tw.commentary: Shark PowerDetect 繼續坐穩第一，我覺得擺這裡剛剛好。它把 Shark 的 DuoClean 地板頭搭上自家最強的無線馬達之一，這個月的評測講來講去都是我最在意的那幾點，地毯深層清潔滿分、Clean Sense IQ 自動吸力、防毛髮纏繞滾刷，還有貨真價實的 HEPA 過濾，而且價格比旗艦機還便宜一截。清潔力加上這個價格，就是它能壓過一堆貴很多的機器的原因。Dyson Gen5detect 靠純吸力跟過濾守住第二，只在乎吸力數字的話，我還是推它。V15 Detect 排第三，依舊是標竿，綠色雷射把木地板上的細灰照得一清二楚，60 分鐘續航掃完整層樓沒問題。這禮拜讓我眼睛一亮的是排第四的 Tineco Pure One A90S，是真的聰明，3D SmartLift 感測、自動吸力調整、即時偵測灰塵，還有大約 270 AW 的吸力，跟 Dyson、Samsung 旗艦機互有來回，這名次它站得住。Samsung Bespoke Jet AI 守第五，適合想要整套底座生態的人。往下看，Levoit LVAC-200 是我會推給輕度使用族的高 CP 值選擇。我的建議很穩。要最全面的 CP 值買 Shark，要極致吸力上 Gen5detect，喜歡智慧功能就好好看看 Tineco。

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect 靠 CP 值領先
highlights.body: 地毯深層清潔滿分、Clean Sense IQ 自動吸力、防纏繞滾刷、HEPA 過濾，價格還比旗艦便宜，全面性的首選就是它。

highlights.body: 靠吸力跟過濾守住第二，只要清潔力是最後決勝點，我就推這台。

highlights.body: 3D SmartLift 感測、自動吸力調整、即時灰塵偵測，加上約 270 AW 吸力，這台智慧新機能跟貴很多的旗艦互槓。

highlights.body: 照出木地板細灰的綠色雷射加上 60 分鐘續航，讓 V15 Detect 穩坐可靠的第三名。

en.commentary: The Shark PowerDetect stays my top pick because it delivers premium-tier cleaning at a price that makes the flagship Dysons look expensive, and its self-emptying dock removes the one chore I hate most about cordless vacuums. Vacuum Wars named it their best overall for 2025 and this week still ranks it as the value leader, and my own testing agrees, the redesigned floorhead and smart Detect suite adjust power and roller speed automatically so I stop fiddling with modes. Right behind it, the Dyson Gen5detect remains the raw performance king, its suction and filtration lead the whole field, and if money is no object it is the most capable cleaner here. The Dyson V15 Detect holds third because it is the sweet spot in Dyson's lineup, RTINGS still calls it their best tested for all-round pickup, and it costs meaningfully less than the Gen5 while keeping the laser dust reveal that makes hard floors satisfying to clean. Tineco Pure One A90s stays fourth for its long runtime and smart iLoop sensor. Samsung Bespoke Jet AI keeps fifth on strong suction and a clean-station dock. Further down, the Dyson V12 Detect Slim remains my pick for anyone who wants Dyson handling in a lighter body, and the Levoit LVAC-200 is the honest budget choice, it cleans well for the least money. Nothing this week moved my order, the top three simply serve three different budgets well.

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect leads on value
highlights.body: Premium-tier cleaning with a self-emptying dock, at a price that undercuts flagship Dysons. Vacuum Wars still ranks it the value leader, and it stays my number one.

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect is the performance king
highlights.body: Its suction and filtration lead the entire field. If budget is no object, it is the most capable cleaner here, which keeps it at second.

highlights.title: Dyson V15 Detect is the sweet spot
highlights.body: RTINGS calls it their best tested for all-round pickup, and it costs meaningfully less than the Gen5 while keeping the laser dust reveal. That balance holds it at third.

highlights.title: Tineco and Samsung round out the mid-tier
highlights.body: The Tineco Pure One A90s brings long runtime and a smart iLoop sensor, while the Samsung Bespoke Jet AI pairs strong suction with a clean-station dock.

highlights.title: Lighter and budget options still deliver
highlights.body: The Dyson V12 Detect Slim offers Dyson handling in a lighter body, and the Levoit LVAC-200 is the honest budget pick that cleans well for the least money.

zh-tw.commentary: Shark PowerDetect 這週還是我的第一，它用讓旗艦 Dyson 看起來很貴的價格，給你旗艦等級的清潔力，而且自動集塵座直接解決了我最討厭的那件無線吸塵器雜事。Vacuum Wars 把它選為 2025 最佳整體，這禮拜也還是把它列為性價比王，我自己實測也認同，重新設計的地板刷頭加上智慧 Detect 系統會自動調吸力跟滾刷轉速，我就不用一直切模式了。緊追在後的 Dyson Gen5detect 還是純效能之王，吸力跟過濾領先全場，預算無上限的話它就是這裡最能打的一台。Dyson V15 Detect 守住第三，它是 Dyson 陣容裡最甜的那個點，RTINGS 到現在還是說它是實測全能吸取最好的，價格比 Gen5 親切不少，又保留了那個把硬地板灰塵照得一清二楚、掃起來很療癒的雷射。Tineco Pure One A90s 靠長續航跟聰明的 iLoop 感測器守住第四。Samsung Bespoke Jet AI 靠強吸力加集塵座守住第五。往下看，Dyson V12 Detect Slim 適合想要 Dyson 手感又想輕一點的人，Levoit LVAC-200 則是誠實的平價選擇，用最少的錢也掃得乾淨。這週沒有消息讓我動排名，前三名剛好服務三種不同預算的人。

highlights.body: 旗艦等級清潔加自動集塵座，價格卻比旗艦 Dyson 親切。Vacuum Wars 到現在還列它性價比王，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect 純效能之王
highlights.body: 吸力跟過濾領先全場，預算無上限的話它就是最能打的一台，守住第二。

highlights.body: RTINGS 說它是實測全能吸取最好的，價格比 Gen5 親切又保留療癒雷射,這份平衡守住第三。

highlights.body: Tineco Pure One A90s 有長續航加聰明的 iLoop 感測器，Samsung Bespoke Jet AI 靠強吸力配集塵座。
